AOSN (Percheron).competitors: VCA Animal Hospitals, BluePearl Specialty and Emergency Pet Hospital, Animal Specialty Group, ACCESS Specialty Animal Hospitals, Animal Emergency and Specialty Center
AOSN (Percheron).summary: Veterinary specialty care network owned by Percheron Capital, operating ~55 outpatient specialty locations across 19 states, anchored in dermatology and expanding to other specialties.

Highlands Coffee.ownership: Owned by SuperFoods Group (JV of Viet Thai International and Jollibee Foods Corporation)
Highlands Coffee.summary: Founded 1999 by David Thai, Highlands is Vietnam's largest coffee chain with ~850 outlets, blending Vietnamese coffee heritage with modern cafe culture.

Counter Service.competitors: Sweetgreen, Dig Inn, Two Hands, Num Pang, Avocaderia
Counter Service.summary: Premium fast-casual sandwich concept founded by Chipotle's founder Steve Ells with VC backing (~$36M Series A), launching early 2025 in NYC.

Montucky Cold Snack (EJ Gallo).ownership: Privately held; largest family-owned winery in the world
Montucky Cold Snack (EJ Gallo).competitors: The Wine Group, Constellation Brands, Trinchero Family Estates, Diageo, Pernod Ricard
Montucky Cold Snack (EJ Gallo).summary: E & J Gallo Winery, founded 1933 by Ernest and Julio Gallo, is the world's largest family-owned winery; engagement concerns retail concepts for its Montucky Cold Snacks beer brand.

Bagel Brands.headquarters: 555 Zang Street, Suite 300, Lakewood, Colorado, USA
Bagel Brands.competitors: Bagel Boy, Kettleman Bagel, Bagel Factory
Bagel Brands.summary: Parent of Einstein Bros., Bruegger's, Noah's and Manhattan Bagel; part of Panera Brands under JAB, with 1,100+ U.S. locations.

BJs Restaurants.headquarters: 7755 Center Avenue, Suite 300, Huntington Beach, California 92647
BJs Restaurants.competitors: The Cheesecake Factory, Applebee's, Chili's Grill & Bar, Buffalo Wild Wings, Darden Restaurants, Red Robin, California Pizza Kitchen, Cheddar's Scratch Kitchen, O'Charley's
BJs Restaurants.summary: Founded 1978 in Santa Ana, BJ's operates 217 brewhouse-concept restaurants across 31 states, 100% company-owned, with ~$1.35B FY2024 revenue.

Cava.summary: Founded 2006 in Maryland as Cava Mezze, CAVA Group is a fast-casual Mediterranean bowl/pita concept with 398 company-owned units and $954.3M FY2024 revenue.

Habit Burger.industry: Quick Service Restaurant / Fast Casual Dining
Habit Burger.competitors: In-N-Out, Five Guys, Shake Shack, Whataburger, Jack in the Box, Burger King, Wendy's, Culver's, Freddy's, A&W
Habit Burger.summary: Founded 1969 in Santa Barbara, Habit Burger & Grill is a chargrilled-burger chain owned by Yum! Brands with ~356 locations.

Veritas Veterinary.headquarters: 246 Industrial Way W, Eatontown, New Jersey, 07724, USA
Veritas Veterinary.competitors: Zoetis, Grey Wolf Animal Health, IndeVets, NVA Compassion-First, Companion Pet Partners, Curo Pet Care, EverVet Partners, Ethos Veterinary Health
Veritas Veterinary.summary: Founded 2022 and owned by Percheron, Veritas is a national network of 80+ specialty and emergency veterinary providers.

Goddard Schools.summary: Founded 1983, Goddard School is a daycare and early-education franchisor with 600+ units and ~$1.7M average revenue per school, potentially the largest franchisor in its industry.

Blaze Pizza.competitors: MOD Pizza, Pieology, Domino's, Pizza Hut, Papa John's, Little Caesars
Blaze Pizza.summary: Founded 2011 by Elise and Rick Wetzel, Blaze Pizza is a customizable fast-fired pizza chain with 308 mostly-franchised locations, HQ relocated to Atlanta in 2024.

Cartier.industry: Luxury goods: jewellery, watches, leather goods, accessories, fragrances
Cartier.annual_revenue: Part of Richemont's Jewellery Maisons (combined €14.2B FY24); standalone not disclosed
Cartier.competitors: Bulgari, Tiffany & Co., Van Cleef & Arpels, Rolex, Omega, Patek Philippe, Jaeger-LeCoultre, IWC, Audemars Piguet
Cartier.summary: Founded 1847 in Paris by Louis-Francois Cartier, Cartier is a Richemont-owned luxury Maison with ~270 boutiques worldwide.

GSP.industry: Private equity / growth / principal investment (multi-unit / franchised businesses)
GSP.competitors: Roark Capital, Sentinel Capital, L Catterton
GSP.summary: Garnett Station Partners, founded 2013 by Matt Perelman and Alex Sloane, is a NY private equity firm focused on multi-unit/franchised consumer businesses, managing over $3.5B AUM after closing Fund 5.0 at $1.2B.

JSX.ownership: Single company (air carrier), not a franchise
JSX.competitors: Aero, Surf Air / Surf Air Mobility, XO (XOJET), Blade, Tradewind Aviation, Southwest, American, Delta
JSX.summary: Founded 2016 as JetSuiteX, JSX is a Dallas-based public charter operator offering semi-private flights from private terminals, named #1 Domestic Airline by Travel + Leisure (2025).

Casey's.industry: Retail convenience stores and fuel stations
Casey's.competitors: 7-Eleven, Circle K, Speedway, QuikTrip, Kwik Trip, Kum & Go, Murphy USA, Domino's, Papa John's, Hy-Vee, Kroger
Casey's.summary: Founded 1967 in Iowa, Casey's is a Midwestern convenience-store and fuel chain with 2,500+ locations, fifth-largest U.S. pizza chain, and $15.9B FY2025 revenue.

Whataburger.summary: Founded 1950 by Harmon Dobson and Paul Burton, Whataburger is a made-to-order burger chain with 1,174 units and an estimated $4.1B in 2024 revenue.

Wonder.headquarters: 150 Greenwich St, 4 World Trade Center, 57th Floor, New York, 10007, US
Wonder.summary: Founded 2018 by Marc Lore, Wonder is a multi-restaurant food-hall/delivery tech startup valued ~$7B that acquired Grubhub for $650M and is scaling from 46 to 90 units.

Smalls Sliders.annual_revenue: ~$1.73M average gross revenue per unit (2025 FDD)
Smalls Sliders.competitors: White Castle, Krystal, Freddy's, Shake Shack, Smashburger, Five Guys, McDonald's, Wendy's, Burger King
Smalls Sliders.summary: Founded 2019 by Brandon Landry with backing from Drew Brees and 10 Point Capital, Smalls Sliders is a rapidly growing slider QSR using modular 'Cans', ~90% franchised.

Insomnia Cookies.competitors: Crumbl Cookies, Chip City, Milk Bar, Levain, DoorDash, Uber Eats
Insomnia Cookies.summary: Founded 2002 by Seth Berkowitz in a UPenn dorm, Insomnia Cookies is a warm-cookie delivery chain with ~350 mostly company-owned locations.

Panera Bread.ownership: ~1,052 corporate / ~1,112 franchised (52% franchised); multi-unit franchising only
Panera Bread.competitors: Chipotle Mexican Grill, Starbucks, Shake Shack, MOD Pizza, Sweetgreen, Einstein Bros. Bagels
Panera Bread.summary: Founded 1987 as St. Louis Bread Company, Panera is a bakery-cafe chain of ~2,239 units under JAB Holding's Panera Brands, with ~$6.4B revenue.

Great Harvest Bakery and Cafe.competitors: Local cafes, Panera Bread, Bread Alone, Alpine Valley Bread Company, One Mighty Mill, Rudis bakery, Angelica Bakehouse
Great Harvest Bakery and Cafe.summary: Founded 1976 by Pete and Laura Wakeman, Great Harvest is a 160-unit Montana-based bakery-cafe franchise using a freedom-franchise and hub-and-spoke model.

Roark Capital.industry: Private Equity (franchise and multi-unit business models)
Roark Capital.ownership: PE firm; most units franchised/affiliate across portfolio brands
Roark Capital.competitors: KKR, The Riverside Company, CDH Investments, Canvas Capital
Roark Capital.summary: Founded 2001 by Neal Aronson, Roark Capital is an Atlanta PE firm specializing in franchise and multi-unit businesses, whose portfolio brands collectively operate ~112,000+ locations.

Restaurant Brands International (RBI).industry: Quick Service Restaurants (QSR) / Fast Food Holding Company
Restaurant Brands International (RBI).competitors: McDonald's, Yum! Brands, Starbucks, Subway, Chick-fil-A, Wendy's, Domino's, Chipotle, Wingstop, Raising Cane's
Restaurant Brands International (RBI).summary: Formed 2014 via the Burger King-Tim Hortons merger by 3G Capital, RBI is a Miami-based QSR holding company (Burger King, Tim Hortons, Popeyes, Firehouse Subs) with 32,000+ restaurants, ~95% franchised.

Subway.competitors: Jersey Mike's Subs, Jimmy John's, Firehouse Subs, Arby's, Panera Bread, McDonald's, Wendy's, Starbucks, Domino's
Subway.summary: Founded 1965 by Fred DeLuca and Dr. Peter Buck, Subway is a fully franchised sandwich QSR with ~37,000 restaurants globally.

Sweetgreen.competitors: Cava, Just Salad, Chipotle Mexican Grill, Panera Bread, Dig (Dig Inn)
Sweetgreen.summary: Founded 2007 by three Georgetown students, Sweetgreen is a 246-unit, 100% company-owned healthy fast-casual chain with ~$676.8M FY2024 revenue.

Swish.headquarters: Al-Bahar Tower, Ahmed Al Jaber Street, Sharq-Block 1, Kuwait City, Kuwait
Swish.competitors: KFC Kuwait, Burger King, Papa John's, Hardee's, Elevation Burger, Blaze Pizza, Majid Al Futtaim, Americana Group
Swish.summary: Founded 2012 in Kuwait, SWiSH is a multi-brand F&B group (Yelo! Pizza, BBT, Slice Doner, Lovebird and others) seeking to scale via franchising starting 2027.

Wendy's.headquarters: 1 Dave Thomas Boulevard, Dublin, Ohio, U.S.
Wendy's.competitors: McDonald's, Burger King, Chick-fil-A, Taco Bell
Wendy's.summary: Founded 1969 by Dave Thomas in Columbus, Ohio, Wendy's is a QSR burger chain with 7,242 mostly-franchised restaurants and $2.24B 2024 revenue.

Golden West Food.industry: Food & Beverage Manufacturing (meat processing, ready-to-eat meals, private label, licensed products)
Golden West Food.headquarters: 3420 East Vernon Avenue, Vernon, California, USA
Golden West Food.ownership: Manufacturing/distribution; does not operate retail franchises
Golden West Food.summary: Founded 1970 in Vernon, CA, Golden West Food Group is a diversified food manufacturer doing private label and licensed-brand production (Jack Daniel's, Cinnabon, TGI Fridays and others) with ~$59.2M revenue.

Millburn Deli.headquarters: 328 Millburn Ave, Millburn, New Jersey, 07041, USA
Millburn Deli.competitors: Fiore's House of Quality, Oscar's Deli & Restaurant, Goldberg's Famous Deli & Bagel Chateau
Millburn Deli.summary: Founded 1946, Millburn Deli is a New Jersey sandwich shop with 4 units, making products in-house, and expanding to Jersey City and Bridgewater.

Sasse Server (Liz Moscow).summary: Founded 2024 by Liz Moscow and her husband, an early-stage tech-enabled services startup supporting casual dining brands (working on an LOI with IHOP).

Mass Bay Brewing Company (MBBC).summary: Founded 1986 and headquartered in Boston, Mass Bay Brewing Company operates the Harpoon and Long Trail beer brands plus ~5 restaurant/brewpub units.

Island Grill Jamaica.summary: A 30+ year-old Jamaican jerk chicken QSR with 15-17 locations, aiming to reach 30 within 5 years and expand to other Caribbean islands; commissary capacity is the key constraint.

WoodStone.ownership: Acquired by Henny Penny in 2014; employee owned (ESOP)
WoodStone.summary: Founded 1990 and acquired by Henny Penny in 2014, WoodStone is an employee-owned Bellingham, WA kitchen/oven equipment manufacturer with $25M-$40M revenue.

NomadGo.industry: Supply Chain Technology, Inventory Management, Spatial AI
NomadGo.summary: Founded 2017 by David Greschler and Jonah Friedl, NomadGo is a Bellevue, WA computer-vision/AR inventory-management startup (METAShelf) with under 50 employees and $1.5M seed funding.

Brinker (Chili's).summary: Founded 1975 by Larry Lavine in Dallas, Chili's (owned by publicly traded Brinker) is a casual-dining chain of 1,600+ units seeking to redesign its kitchens for the future.

Take 5 Oil.ownership: Company-owned and franchised; TWO Private Equity owns territory in GA, TN, AL
Take 5 Oil.summary: Founded 1984 in Metairie, LA, Take 5 Oil Change is a drive-thru oil-change chain with 500-600 locations and plans to reach 2,000 within ten years.

Highlands Coffee (Vietnam).ownership: 100% owned by SuperFoods Group (50% owned by Jollibee and Viet Thai International)
Highlands Coffee (Vietnam).summary: Founded 1999 and headquartered in Hanoi, Highlands Coffee is Vietnam's largest coffee chain (~800 units) seeking operational-excellence support to hyperscale via company-owned and franchised growth.

Blue Cardinal.focus_brand: McWilliams & Son Heating and Air Conditioning
Blue Cardinal.summary: Blue Cardinal Home Services Group, founded by tradesman Trey McWilliams and backed by Percheron Capital, is a home-services (HVAC) roll-up anchored by McWilliams & Son.

Killer Burger.summary: Founded 2010 in Portland, Killer Burger is an award-winning burger chain with 23 locations seeking to reduce ticket times below 10 minutes.

BB & Cross/Abbott.summary: Engagement involving Abbott's cardiovascular/vascular medical-devices division (Abbott Laboratories, HQ Chicago, ~114K employees, $40B revenue), referred via Blackberry and Cross.

Cilantro Cafe.summary: Started in the 1990s and purchased ~2010 by Delicious Inc, Cilantro Cafe is an Egyptian coffee chain with ~60 locations seeking operations transformation and growth.

Caliber Car Wash.competitors: Zips Car Wash, Mister Car Wash
Caliber Car Wash.summary: Founded 2019 and Percheron-backed since 2021, Caliber Car Wash is an Atlanta-based express/membership car wash with 55+ locations across the Southeast and Texas.

Nicola Wealth.annual_revenue: Over $16 billion in assets under management
Nicola Wealth.summary: Founded 1994 by John Nicola, Nicola Wealth is a Vancouver family-owned wealth-management firm with $16B+ AUM seeking a lean transformation under its incoming CEO.

HAWKERS.ownership: Privately Held; Savory Fund invested June 2025
HAWKERS.summary: Founded 2011 by four friends with Malaysian, Hong Kong and Vietnamese roots, Hawkers Asian Street Food operates 15 locations across 7 states with $66M (2023) revenue, rescued from bankruptcy by Savory Fund in June 2025.
